comments.text:
Worst experience ever. (Bajaj Credit Card)

I trusted your recommendation, and because of that I paid the ₹530 fee for the credit card. Now the card isn’t allowing any online purchases—it keeps asking for an offline transaction first.

When I went to a store for an offline purchase, they told me that online-issued cards have no value and that my money is basically wasted. They also said that if I want to buy something around ₹3,500, then extra processing and DVS charges will apply.

I really don’t understand what this system is. Overall, this has been the worst experience, and I can’t trust or believe your videos anymore.
